languages.text: "Что?.." {n}Юноша вздрагивает и прикрывает лицо, уже сокрытое маской.{/n} "Они... оскверняют тела павших детей Императора? Но зачем?"

traits.locale_text: "Что?.." {n}Юноша вздрагивает и прикрывает лицо, уже сокрытое маской.{/n} "Они... оскверняют тела павших детей Императора? Но зачем?"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "Что?.." {n}Юноша вздрагивает и прикрывает лицо, уже сокрытое маской.{/n} "Они... оскверняют тела павших детей Императора? Но зачем?"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "What?.." {n}The young man shudders and covers his face already hidden behind the mask.{/n} "Are they... desecrating the bodies of the Emperor's fallen children? But why?"
languages.original_text: "Что?.." {n}Юноша вздрагивает и прикрывает лицо, уже сокрытое маской.{/n} "Они... оскверняют тела павших детей Императора? Но зачем?"

traits.locale_text: "What?.." {n}The young man shudders and covers his face already hidden behind the mask.{/n} "Are they... desecrating the bodies of the Emperor's fallen children? But why?"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "What?.." {n}The young man shudders and covers his face already hidden behind the mask.{/n} "Are they... desecrating the bodies of the Emperor's fallen children? But why?"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Was?..." {n}Der junge Mann erschaudert und verdeckt sein Gesicht, das bereits hinter der Maske verborgen ist.{/n} "Schänden sie... die Leichen der gefallenen Kinder des Kaisers? Aber warum?"
languages.original_text: "What?.." {n}The young man shudders and covers his face already hidden behind the mask.{/n} "Are they... desecrating the bodies of the Emperor's fallen children? But why?"

languages.text: "Quoi ?..." {n}Le jeune homme frémit et couvre son visage déjà caché derrière le masque.{/n} "Sont-ils... en train de profaner les corps des enfants de l'Empereur tombés au combat ? Mais pourquoi ?"
languages.original_text: "What?.." {n}The young man shudders and covers his face already hidden behind the mask.{/n} "Are they... desecrating the bodies of the Emperor's fallen children? But why?"

languages.text: “什么？。”{n}年轻人颤抖着捂住已经藏在面具后面的脸。{/n}“他们是在......亵渎皇帝死去的孩子们的尸体吗？但为什么呢？”
languages.original_text: "What?.." {n}The young man shudders and covers his face already hidden behind the mask.{/n} "Are they... desecrating the bodies of the Emperor's fallen children? But why?"

languages.text: "¿Qué?" {n}El joven se estremece y se cubre el rostro ya oculto tras la máscara.{/n} "¿Están... profanando los cuerpos de los hijos caídos del Emperador? Pero, ¿por qué?"
languages.original_text: "What?.." {n}The young man shudders and covers his face already hidden behind the mask.{/n} "Are they... desecrating the bodies of the Emperor's fallen children? But why?"

languages.text: "なんだと？"{n}青年は身を震わせ、すでにマスクで隠れていた顔を覆う。{/n}"彼らは...皇帝の子供たちの遺体を冒涜しているのか？でもなぜ？"
languages.original_text: "What?.." {n}The young man shudders and covers his face already hidden behind the mask.{/n} "Are they... desecrating the bodies of the Emperor's fallen children? But why?"

languages.text: "Ne?.." {n}Genç adam titriyor ve zaten maskenin ardına gizlenmiş olan yüzünü kapatıyor.{/n} "Onlar... İmparator'un ölen çocuklarının bedenlerine saygısızlık mı ediyorlar? Ama neden?"
languages.original_text: "What?.." {n}The young man shudders and covers his face already hidden behind the mask.{/n} "Are they... desecrating the bodies of the Emperor's fallen children? But why?"
